connection.title: LLM Connection
connection.subtitle: Connect to your LLM server (Ollama, OpenAI, or any compatible API).

status.failed: Connection failed - Check if server is running
status.no_models: Connected but no models - Please pull a model first

window.title: Select Target Window
window.subtitle: Choose the chat window you want to automate.

area.title: Area Setup
area.subtitle: Capture the target window and detect chat areas, or manually select them.
area.warning_no_ocr:
No OCR engine. Auto detect uses heuristics only.
Install: pip install easyocr

chat.title: Auto Chat
chat.prompt_default: You are a friendly assistant. Respond naturally and briefly (1-3 sentences), like a real conversation. Match the other person's tone and style.
chat.warning_no_ocr:
No OCR engine found. Reply detection will not work.
Install: pip install easyocr
chat.warning_no_input:
xdotool not found. Input simulation is disabled.
Install: sudo apt install xdotool
Then restart Liao.

overlay.chat_hint: Draw [Chat Message Area] (green), press ESC to cancel
overlay.input_hint: Draw [Input Box Area] (blue), press ESC to cancel
overlay.send_hint: Click [Send Button] position (orange), press ESC to cancel

dialog.screen_permission_text:
Liao needs screen capture permission to read chat messages.

A system dialog will appear. Please select your screen and click Share.
dialog.screen_permission_failed:
Screen capture permission was not granted.

Without this permission, Liao cannot capture screenshots to read chat messages.

Please restart the application and grant permission when prompted.
